'''Bollin''' was the oldest [[platform city]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]], and its age showed in its aging technology, low population, and dilapidated buildings. Most of its business revolved around exporting Cularin's exotic woods. Bollin had the best relationship with the [[Tarasin]] of any of the platform cities. Indeed, its [[Baron Administrator/Legends|baron administrator]] as of [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]] was a Tarasin named [[Ta'Shal]]. Bollin also had a zoo, the [[Bollin Exotic Animal Emporium]], which had the only known captured [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]].<ref name="l">''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
